_meta.name: DEST1 ALM ship preflight — phi gate harness verified + r12 2000-step plan

r10c_planned.status: BLOCKED — r10 collapse triple, r10c never landed step_2000 (mode collapse step ~63)

r12_default.status: BLOCKED — BG #21 trainer wiring (Phase-5 wire FFI to v565 cache_fwd + bwd + adamw)

gap_analysis.gap: r12 default 500 steps != dest1 gate 2000 steps. After BG #21 100-step smoke PASS, must launch a SINGLE r12 with --steps 2000 to reach the dest1 gate.
gap_analysis.decision: Option (a) — single r12 --steps 2000 production launch after BG #21 smoke PASS
gap_analysis.rationale: feedback_one_shot_best — cheaper to do full 2000 in one go ($7-9) than split-launch r12_smoke + separate r10c_2000 ($14 + $50). Pod 87xsc already paid for; only marginal $2.99/h.

fix_b_2026_04_20.root_cause: stage0 hexa lexer emits Verify token for bare `verify` identifier; parser tries to consume it as a built-in stmt kind (VerifyStmt), producing 9 parse errors. `hexa parse` printed errors but exited 0 — masking failure for `hexa run`.
fix_b_2026_04_20.fix: Renamed fn `verify` → `verify_phi`. Inline comment block (lines 195-205) records root + fix per feedback_troubleshoot_comments.

PASS_input_phi_holo_scaled_12340.stdout: [phi_gate] step=2000 phi_holo_scaled=12340 ce=0.291 verdict=PASS gate=1000 WARN=legacy_absolute_no_baseline

FAIL_input_phi_holo_scaled_800.stdout: [phi_gate] step=500 phi_holo_scaled=800 ce=1.5 verdict=FAIL gate=1000 WARN=legacy_absolute_no_baseline

MISS_input_nonexistent_path.stdout: [phi_gate] ERROR: cannot read phi_vec.json and no fallback path: ...

phi_vec_json_output_path.writes_phi_vec_json_evidence: save_lora_device_state writes adapter_config.json + adapter_model.hexackpt only. No phi_vec.json sidecar emitted at save_every cadence.
phi_vec_json_output_path.race_avoidance: BG #21 is wiring train_alm_lora.hexa Phase-5. Editing the trainer to add phi_vec dump WHILE BG #21 wires would race the same file. Decision: ship a SIDECAR emitter that runs AFTER trainer save (no edit to train_alm_lora.hexa).

sidecar_emitter.purpose: Writes verifier-compatible phi_vec.json next to ckpt step dir from CE input.
sidecar_emitter.schema: matches phi_gt_1000_verify.hexa expectation (top-level phi_holo_scaled, ce_proxy, step, schema, round, seed)
sidecar_emitter.smoke: PASS — emit→verify chain on /tmp/dest1_emit_smoke (CE=0.291 → phi_holo_scaled=12344.3 → verdict=PASS exit 0)

phi_vec_json_output_path.future_inline_path: After BG #21 wiring lands, optionally inline a write_phi_vec(out_dir, step, ce) call inside save_lora_device_state at line 1709 (after HEXACKPT-v2 stream complete). Sidecar will then become a fallback safety net.

r12_2000_step_launch_plan.predecessor_gate: BG #21 trainer wiring lands → 1-step CLI smoke PASS → 100-step CLI smoke PASS → only then this 2000-step launch
r12_2000_step_launch_plan.watchdog: r11_ffi_watchdog.hexa or successor — pod-side tmux supervisor
r12_2000_step_launch_plan.save_every_rationale: 200 chosen so step_2000 + 9 intermediate checkpoints land. Below MFS quota lower bound (per training/CLAUDE.md runpod_mfs_quota: save_every >= 2000 for HEAVY models, but ALM r12 LoRA-only ckpts are ~30MB each — 10 saves = 300MB, well under quota).

eta.rationale: 4-5 s/step on H100 SXM at batch=4 seq=1024 lora_r=8 fp32 (per v5.6.5 4-step descent smoke: 14.35→13.85 over 3 LoRA steps in ~12s = ~4 s/step)

ship_chain_artifacts.phi_vec_sidecar: training/dest1_phi_vec_emit.hexa (NEW — emits verifier-compatible phi_vec.json from CE)
ship_chain_artifacts.ship_orchestrator: training/dest1_alm_ship_chain.hexa (NEW — emit + verify + R2 upload chain, --live gated)

ship_chain_e2e_smoke.result: DRY-RUN PASS — all 4 stages printed canonical commands; phi gate verdict=PASS chain ready
ship_chain_e2e_smoke.live_gate: --live flag required to execute remote ssh+rclone

dest1_ship_total_eta.BG21_trainer_wiring: 6h (per dest1_alm_ship task brief — already in flight)
dest1_ship_total_eta.cost_to_dest1_shipped_usd: $26.5 (6h wiring × $0 if BG = anima-side + 2.5h r12 × $2.99 + minor verify/upload)

compliance.py_ban_evidence: All 3 new files are .hexa; no .py created/edited
compliance.race_avoidance_evidence: Did NOT edit train_alm_lora.hexa during BG #21 wiring; sidecar emitter inserted instead
compliance.h100_pod_cap: 1 of 2 (87xsc only; no new pod spun)
compliance.troubleshoot_inline_evidence: phi_gt_1000_verify.hexa lines 195-204 record FIX-B root + fix per feedback_troubleshoot_comments

next_actions.description: Wait for BG #21 trainer wiring → 100-step smoke PASS
Launch r12 2000-step production training on pod 87xsc per launch_cli above
